song.title: Nearer Each Day
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G C Am Nearer each day to me . D G Bm Em Dearer each day to me, . C Am This Person inside me is . D G Bm Em Becoming reali_ty. . C Am Saving me, loving me .D G Bm Em Faith and hope giving me. . C Em Am You’re all the world to me, . D G C G Jesus my Lord.
[V2] Even when faith is small When there’s no hope at all I hear Him say to me, Trust in Me and you’ll see That I’ll supply all your needs If only you will believe. All anxious doubts will cease While trusting in Me.
